BRA|NOR.text: Brazil meet Norway in the last 16, with the winner advancing to the quarter-finals. Norway are appearing at their first World Cup in 28 years and have never previously reached the last eight. Erling Haaland leads the Norwegian side against Brazil.

sources.headline: World Cup Daily live: Mexico fans try to give England sleepless night
Stay humble - the Premier League feud about to hit world stage
Brazil going out? Chris Sutton predicts World Cup's last-16 matches

ENG|MEX.text: England meet host nation Mexico in the World Cup round of 16, with the match being played in Mexico City. Mexico coach Javier Aguirre said his side will need an almost perfect performance to advance, while England manager Thomas Tuchel expects the conditions to bring out his team's best. Altitude and the venue's history present added challenges for England.

sources.headline: World Cup Daily live: Mexico fans try to give England sleepless night
Fast-food chain Greggs benches Mexican sandwich ahead on England World Cup match
Aguirre: Mexico will need an almost perfect match to beat England
